add-text-annotation-to-page-3.title: Add Text Annotation to Page 3 of PDF
add-text-annotation-to-page-3.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a TextAnnotation on the third page, and saving the modified document.

create-linked-popup-highlight-annotation.title: Create Linked Popup and Highlight Annotations
create-linked-popup-highlight-annotation.description: Shows how to add a highlight annotation and a linked popup note to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-free-text-annotation-arial.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Arial Font to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-arial.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation to a PDF page using Arial 12‑point font and save the modified document.

add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.title: Add Callout Leader Line to Free‑Text Annotation
add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.description: Demonstrates how to create a FreeTextAnnotation, set its Callout property with three points to draw a leader line, and save the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-freetext-annotation-page-5.title: Hide FreeText Annotation on Page 5
hide-freetext-annotation-page-5.description: Demonstrates locating a FreeTextAnnotation on a specific PDF page and adding a HideAction to make the annotation invisible while preserving its data.

add-yellow-highlight-annotation.title: Add Yellow Highlight Annotation with Opacity
add-yellow-highlight-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation to a PDF page, set its color to yellow, adjust opacity to 80%, and save the modified document.

set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.title: Set Underline Annotation Opacity to 50%
set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.description: Shows how to load a PDF, find underline annotations on a given page, set their opacity to 50%, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-strikeout-annotation-with-author.title: Add StrikeOut Annotation with Author to PDF
add-strikeout-annotation-with-author.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a StrikeOut annotation, set its author (Title), add it to a page, and save the updated document.

delete-annotation-by-id-from-page-two.title: Delete Annotation by Id from PDF Page 2
delete-annotation-by-id-from-page-two.description: Demonstrates how to locate an annotation on the second page of a PDF using its Name property and remove it with Aspose.Pdf, then save the modified document.

remove-annotations-from-pdf-page.title: Remove All Annotations from a Specific PDF Page
remove-annotations-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, access the third page, clear all its annotations, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-annotations-from-page.title: Retrieve Annotations from a Specific PDF Page
retrieve-annotations-from-page.description: Loads a PDF, ensures it has at least four pages, accesses page 4, obtains its AnnotationCollection, and prints each annotation's type to the console.

update-annotation-rectangle-by-id.title: Update Annotation Rectangle by Id in PDF
update-annotation-rectangle-by-id.description: Shows how to locate an annotation in a PDF by its Name/Id and change its rectangle coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-xfdf.title: Import Annotations from XFDF String into PDF
import-annotations-from-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing annotations from an XFDF string via a memory stream, and saving the updated document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, checking its existence, and exporting all annotations (including those on the current page) to an XFDF file saved in the same folder as the PDF.

import-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to read an FDF file and import its annotations into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the updated PDF.

batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Text Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over each page, and programmatically add a TextAnnotation with custom properties using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-keyword-across-pdf-pages.title: Highlight Keyword Across PDF Pages
highlight-keyword-across-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to search for a specific word on each page of a PDF and apply a highlight annotation to every occurrence using Aspose.Pdf.

add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.title: Add Figure Annotations with Custom Line Width and Color
add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically add square and circle annotations with specific line width and color to selected PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Batch Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Files
batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF documents and export each file's annotations to a separate XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs in Parallel
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Shows how to load a single XFDF file and apply its annotations to every PDF in a folder concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-xfdf-annotation-count-per-page.title: Validate XFDF Annotation Count per PDF Page
validate-xfdf-annotation-count-per-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import annotations from an XFDF file, and verify that each page contains the expected number of annotations.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Re-import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file, clearing the document, importing the annotations back, and verifying round‑trip data integrity.

list-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.title: List PDF Annotation IDs to CSV
list-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF, retrieve annotation identifiers, and write them to a CSV file using Aspose.Pdf.

filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Filter PDF Annotations by Author and Remove Others
filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, keep only markup annotations whose Title matches a given user name, and delete all other annotations before saving the filtered document.

add-strikeout-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add StrikeOut Annotation with Author to PDF
add-strikeout-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, define a rectangle over a paragraph, create a strike‑out annotation, set its author, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.title: Generate Annotation Summary per PDF Page
generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.description: The example loads a PDF document, iterates through each page to count the different annotation types, and writes a JSON file summarizing the counts per page.

add-polyline-figure-annotation.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-figure-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, create a custom polyline figure annotation with visual properties, add it to a page, and save the updated document.

add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Arrow Line Annotation to PDF
add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a line annotation with an arrow ending on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.description: Shows how to read an FDF file and import its annotations into a PDF document, preserving the original page numbers, using Aspose.Pdf.

recolor-highlight-annotations-light-gree.title: Recolor Highlight Annotations to Light Green
recolor-highlight-annotations-light-gree.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through all pages and annotations, identify HighlightAnnotation objects, change their color to light green, and save the modified document.

get-annotation-bounding-rectangle.title: Retrieve Annotation Bounding Rectangle
get-annotation-bounding-rectangle.description: Loads a PDF, validates a page and annotation index, retrieves the specified annotation, and logs its bounding rectangle coordinates.

add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with 70% Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.description: Shows how to create a yellow highlight annotation with 70% opacity on the first page of a PDF and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-popup-annotation-with-parent.title: Create Popup Annotation Linked to a Sticky Note
create-popup-annotation-with-parent.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextAnnotation (sticky note) and an associated PopupAnnotation to a PDF page, linking them so the popup appears when the note is selected.

import-xfdf-annotations-remap-pages.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Remap to Target PDF Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-remap-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing annotations from an XFDF file, and moving those annotations to different pages based on a custom mapping dictionary, creating placeholder files when needed.

remove-popup-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Popup Annotations from PDF
remove-popup-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete all popup annotations in a PDF while preserving their parent markup annotations using Aspose.Pdf.

group-pdf-annotations-by-type.title: Group PDF Annotations by Type and Report Summary
group-pdf-annotations-by-type.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, groups annotations by their AnnotationType, and prints a concise summary showing the count and contents per page.

add-file-attachment-annotation.title: Add File Attachment Annotation with External Image
add-file-attachment-annotation.description: Shows how to create a file attachment (figure) annotation in a PDF and use an external image file as its appearance.

copy-pdf-annotations-via-xfdf.title: Copy PDF Annotations via XFDF
copy-pdf-annotations-via-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from one PDF to an XFDF file and then import them into another PDF, effectively copying comments between documents.

batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.title: Batch Add Text Annotation to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, add a standard text annotation to the first page of each document, and save the results to a separate output directory.

change-figure-annotation-color.title: Change Color of Figure Annotation in PDF
change-figure-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, locates the first figure annotation (e.g., square or circle), changes its color to red, forces appearance regeneration, and saves the modified document.

delete-pdf-annotations-from-csv.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using IDs from CSV
delete-pdf-annotations-from-csv.description: Loads a PDF, reads annotation identifiers from a CSV file, and removes matching annotations from all pages before saving the result.

add-free-text-annotation-light-gray.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Light Gray Background
add-free-text-annotation-light-gray.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation to a PDF page, set its appearance, background color, and a simple border using Aspose.Pdf.

set-line-thickness-square-annotation.title: Set Line Thickness for Square Annotation
set-line-thickness-square-annotation.description: Shows how to add a square (figure) annotation to a PDF page and set its border width to 2 points using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Extract Popup Annotation Text to a New PDF
extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first popup annotation, extracts its text content, and saves that content as a separate PDF document.

add-freetext-annotation-with-callout.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Callout to PDF
add-freetext-annotation-with-callout.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a free‑text annotation with a callout line, set its appearance, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-azure-blo.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-azure-blo.description: Shows how to extract annotations from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, convert them to an in‑memory XFDF stream, and upload the XFDF file to an Azure Blob Storage container.

annotate-table-with-rounded-rectangle.title: Annotate Table with Rounded-Corner Rectangle
annotate-table-with-rounded-rectangle.description: Loads a PDF, detects the first table on the first page using TableAbsorber, and adds a square (figure) annotation—optionally with rounded corners—around the table.

retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.title: Retrieve Annotation IDs and Page Numbers from PDF
retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages and annotations, and building a dictionary that maps each annotation's identifier (Name or FullName) to its 1‑based page number for quick lookup.

remove-highlight-annotations.title: Remove Highlight Annotations from PDF
remove-highlight-annotations.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, delete all highlight annotations, and save the cleaned document.

export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Popup Annotations to XFDF
export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to export only popup annotations from a PDF by exporting all annotations to XFDF, filtering the XFDF XML for <popup> elements, and saving the result.

import-fdf-annotations-to-pdf.title: Import Annotations from FDF and Assign to PDF Pages
import-fdf-annotations-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading annotations from an FDF file (which contains page numbers), and saving the updated PDF with the annotations placed on the correct pages.

add-transparent-freetext-annotation.title: Add Transparent Free‑Text Annotation to PDF
add-transparent-freetext-annotation.description: Shows how to add a free‑text annotation with a transparent background and semi‑transparent opacity to an existing PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.title: Set Line Ending Styles for a PDF Line Annotation
set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.description: Demonstrates creating a line annotation in a PDF and configuring its start and end line ending styles (circle and closed arrow) using Aspose.Pdf.

change-highlight-annotation-color.title: Change Highlight Annotation Color in PDF
change-highlight-annotation-color.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through all highlight annotations, sets each annotation's color to a custom light‑orange shade, and saves the modified document.

batch-add-popup-annotations.title: Batch Add Popup Annotations Linked to Text Annotations
batch-add-popup-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and add a TextAnnotation with an associated PopupAnnotation, linking them together using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-set-visibility-b.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Set Visibility by User Role
import-xfdf-annotations-set-visibility-b.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing annotations from an XFDF file, and toggling each annotation's hidden flag based on the current user's role.

add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Polyline Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a polyline annotation by defining a list of points, computing its bounding rectangle, and customizing its appearance before saving the PDF.

add-magenta-underline-annotation.title: Add Magenta Underline Annotation to PDF
add-magenta-underline-annotation.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an underline annotation with magenta color and a 2‑point border thickness, and save the modified document.

extract-pdf3d-annotation-image-preview.title: Extract PDF3D Annotation Image Preview and Embed in Report
extract-pdf3d-annotation-image-preview.description: Demonstrates locating a PDF3DAnnotation in a PDF, retrieving its image preview stream, and embedding that image into a new PDF report.

set-callout-leader-line-length-free-text.title: Set Callout Leader Line Length for Free Text Annotation
set-callout-leader-line-length-free-text.description: Opens an existing PDF, adds a free‑text annotation with a callout (leader) line whose knee point is offset by 20 points, and saves the updated document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload via REST
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.description: Loads a PDF, exports its annotations to an in‑memory XFDF stream, and uploads the XFDF file to a REST API using multipart/form‑data.

import-consolidate-annotations-multiple-.title: Import and Consolidate Annotations from Multiple FDF Files
import-consolidate-annotations-multiple-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import annotations from several FDF files, aggregate them into a single collection, and save the consolidated PDF.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation Linked to Text Annotation
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a TextAnnotation (sticky note) and associate a PopupAnnotation with custom size and position, then save the updated PDF.

set-figure-annotation-border-color-dark-.title: Set Figure Annotation Border Color to Dark Gray
set-figure-annotation-border-color-dark-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and annotations, identify figure annotations, and change their border color to dark gray using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-annotation-ids-to-csv.title: Extract Annotation IDs and Authors to CSV
extract-annotation-ids-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its annotations, retrieve each annotation's identifier and author, and write the results to a CSV file for auditing.

add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with Custom Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a HighlightAnnotation with a specific color and opacity, adding it to a page, and saving the modified document.

delete-pdf-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.title: Delete All PDF Annotations and Restore from XFDF Backup
delete-pdf-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.description: Shows how to remove every annotation from a PDF document and then re‑import them from an XFDF backup file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-highlight-annotation-opacity.title: Set Highlight Annotation Opacity to 60%
set-highlight-annotation-opacity.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, and change the opacity of all highlight annotations to 60% before saving the document.

add-screen-annotation-with-video-to-pdf.title: Add Video Screen Annotation to PDF Page
add-screen-annotation-with-video-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, ensures it has at least three pages, creates a ScreenAnnotation that references a video file, adds it to page three, and saves the modified document.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.title: Insert Sound Annotation (MP3) into PDF
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a SoundAnnotation that plays an MP3 file when the annotation area is clicked, set its icon, tooltip, and border color, and save the updated PDF.

add-flash-rich-media-annotation.title: Add Flash Rich Media Annotation to PDF
add-flash-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a Flash video with a custom SWF player into a PDF using a RichMediaAnnotation, configure activation and flash variables, and save the document.

add-3d-annotation-u3d-to-pdf-page.title: Add 3D Annotation with U3D Model to PDF Page
add-3d-annotation-u3d-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to embed a U3D model as a 3D annotation on the second page of a PDF and set a default 3D view using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.title: Retrieve First RichMediaAnnotation from Page 5
retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, accessing page 5, using LINQ to find the first RichMediaAnnotation, and printing its key properties.

remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Sound Annotations from PDF
remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and delete all SoundAnnotation objects using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-button-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Button Annotation to PDF Page
add-javascript-button-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to place a button on the fourth page of a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that shows an alert when the button is clicked.

add-goto-page-button-annotation.title: Add Go-To-Page Button Annotation
add-goto-page-button-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a button annotation in a PDF that, when clicked, navigates to page 10 of the same document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-centered-watermark-annotation-page-6.title: Insert Centered Watermark Annotation on Page 6
add-centered-watermark-annotation-page-6.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a WatermarkAnnotation with 30 % opacity, positions it at the center of page six, and saves the modified document.

add-text-watermark-annotation.title: Add Text Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a bold "Confidential" text watermark as an annotation to the top of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reuse-single-image-across-pdf-pages.title: Reuse Single Image Across PDF Pages
reuse-single-image-across-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add an image to a PDF once and reuse it on every page using Aspose.Pdf's image resources and AddImage method.

add-background-image-artifact-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Background Image Artifact to PDF Page
add-background-image-artifact-to-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to create a BackgroundArtifact from an image file, configure its properties, and add it to a page's Artifacts collection so it appears behind the page content.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF with Prefix and Fixed Digits
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add Bates numbers with a custom prefix and six‑digit format to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.title: Count Watermark Artifacts on a PDF Page
count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, select a page, and count the WatermarkArtifact objects present in the page's Artifacts collection.

set-watermark-artifact-opacity.title: Set Watermark Artifact Opacity to 50% in PDF
set-watermark-artifact-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve all watermark artifacts from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and change their opacity to 50% before saving the document.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import those annotations into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

import-fdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import FDF Annotations into PDF
import-fdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to read form field data from an FDF file and merge it into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.title: Batch Add Screen Annotations with Videos to PDF Pages
batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.description: Demonstrates how to load a multi‑page PDF, loop through each page, and attach a ScreenAnnotation that plays a video file (cycling through a list) to every page, then save the result.

remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf-pag.title: Remove Background Artifacts from PDF Pages
remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, identify BackgroundArtifact objects, and delete them from the page's artifact collection.

add-link-annotation-external-url.title: Add Link Annotation with External URL to PDF
add-link-annotation-external-url.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a link annotation to a page, and configure it to open an external URL when clicked.

add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Internal Link Annotation to PDF
add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a link annotation that navigates to a specific page within the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-to-each-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation to Each PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-each-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates iterating through all pages of a PDF and attaching a SoundAnnotation that plays a notification tone when the page is opened.

add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.title: Add Auto-Play Rich Media Annotation to PDF
add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.description: Shows how to embed a video or audio file in a PDF using a RichMediaAnnotation and configure it to start playing automatically when the page becomes visible.

clone-watermark-annotation-across-pdf-pa.title: Clone Watermark Annotation Across PDF Pages
clone-watermark-annotation-across-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to clone a WatermarkAnnotation, adjust its position, and apply it to multiple pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Stream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a PDF document directly into an XFDF stream using Aspose.Pdf, without saving the full PDF. The example also demonstrates writing the XFDF data to a file and printing it to the console.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import annotations from an XFDF file while preserving the original page layout, and save the updated document.

create-3d-annotation-custom-lighting.title: Create 3D Annotation with Custom Lighting
create-3d-annotation-custom-lighting.description: Shows how to embed a U3D/PRC 3‑D model into a PDF and apply a custom lighting scheme and render mode using Aspose.Pdf.

iterate-pdf-annotations-log-details.title: Iterate PDF Annotations and Log Types, Rectangles, and Media Files
iterate-pdf-annotations-log-details.description: The example opens a PDF document, walks through each page's annotations, and prints the annotation type, its rectangle coordinates, and any associated media file name by using reflection to access file‑carrying properties.

replace-background-artifact-image.title: Replace Background Artifact Image with High‑Resolution Version
replace-background-artifact-image.description: Loads a PDF, finds background artifacts on each page, and replaces their image with a higher‑resolution file while preserving the original layout.

add-dynamic-date-watermark-annotation.title: Add Dynamic Date Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-dynamic-date-watermark-annotation.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and adds a WatermarkAnnotation that displays the current date and page number with custom styling and opacity, then saves the result.

create-link-annotation-embedded-pdf.title: Create Link Annotation to Open Embedded PDF Attachment
create-link-annotation-embedded-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file into a document and add a link annotation that opens the embedded attachment when clicked.

set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.title: Set Dashed Border for Button Annotations
set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate its annotations, identify button fields, and programmatically set their border style to dashed with a thickness of two points using Aspose.Pdf.

add-video-screen-annotation-disable-cont.title: Add Video Screen Annotation with Disabled Controls
add-video-screen-annotation-disable-cont.description: Demonstrates embedding a video file as a ScreenAnnotation in a PDF, configuring it for loop playback and disabling user interaction controls using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-watermark-artifacts-report.title: Extract Watermark Artifacts from PDF and Generate Report
extract-watermark-artifacts-report.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through each page's artifacts, identifies WatermarkArtifact objects, and writes their page number, position, and opacity to a text report.

add-rich-media-video-annotation-hidden-t.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation with Hidden Toolbar
add-rich-media-video-annotation-hidden-t.description: Demonstrates embedding a video as a RichMedia annotation in a PDF and hiding the default playback toolbar using custom flash variables.

batch-add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Image Watermark to PDFs
batch-add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a collection of PDF files and add the same image watermark to every page using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact, keeping the output file size low.

remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Screen Annotations from PDF
remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, find ScreenAnnotation objects, delete them, and save the cleaned document.

create-link-annotation-named-destination.title: Create Link Annotation to a Named Destination
create-link-annotation-named-destination.description: Demonstrates how to define a named destination in a PDF and add a link annotation that jumps to that destination using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-auto-play.title: Add Sound Annotation with Auto‑Play on Visibility
add-sound-annotation-auto-play.description: Demonstrates how to insert a SoundAnnotation into a PDF that automatically plays a notification tone when the annotation becomes visible on screen.

duplicate-watermark-annotations.title: Duplicate Watermark Annotations Across PDF Pages
duplicate-watermark-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all WatermarkAnnotation objects from the first page, and programmatically copies them to every subsequent page while preserving their visual and metadata properties.

create-3d-annotation-realistic-rendering.title: Create 3D Annotation with Realistic Rendering
create-3d-annotation-realistic-rendering.description: Shows how to embed a 3D model (U3D/PRC) into a PDF, configure lighting and render mode, define a view, and add a PDF3DAnnotation with custom appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

toggle-watermark-visibility-button.title: Toggle Watermark Visibility with Button Annotation
toggle-watermark-visibility-button.description: Shows how to add a WatermarkArtifact to a PDF page and a push‑button annotation that runs JavaScript to toggle the watermark's opacity, making it visible or hidden.

export-modify-import-annotations-xfdf.title: Export Annotations to XFDF, Change Colors, and Re‑Import
export-modify-import-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations to an XFDF file, modifying the annotation color in the XFDF XML, and importing the updated annotations back into the PDF.

add-footer-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Footer Watermark to PDF Pages
add-footer-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating through each page, and adding a WatermarkAnnotation as a footer with a unique identifier, then saving the modified document.

embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media-disable-p.title: Embed PDF Portfolio as Rich Media and Disable Printing
embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media-disable-p.description: Demonstrates adding a RichMediaAnnotation that embeds a PDF portfolio into a PDF document and securing the file by disabling printing via encryption permissions.

add-screen-annotation-external-video.title: Add Screen Annotation with External Video to PDF
add-screen-annotation-external-video.description: Demonstrates how to insert a ScreenAnnotation that points to an external video URL and starts playback automatically in a PDF using Aspose.PDF.

increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.title: Increase Clickable Area of Sound Annotations by 20%
increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.description: Shows how to programmatically enlarge the rectangle of every SoundAnnotation in a PDF by 20% (area) to make the annotation more clickable, then saves the modified document.

apply-pdf-pattern-tiled-watermark.title: Apply PDF Pattern as Tiled Watermark Across All Pages
apply-pdf-pattern-tiled-watermark.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact to tile a PDF page as a background watermark on every page of a document.

add-javascript-link-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Open a URL
add-javascript-link-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation with a JavaScript action that opens a specified URL in a new browser window using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-watermark-annotations.title: Batch Replace Watermark Annotations with Corporate Logo
batch-replace-watermark-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages, removes existing WatermarkAnnotation objects and replaces them with a StampAnnotation that displays a corporate logo while preserving the original opacity and position.

pdf-button-javascript-sum.title: Create PDF Button with JavaScript Sum Calculation
pdf-button-javascript-sum.description: Demonstrates how to add form fields and a push‑button to a PDF and attach JavaScript that reads two numeric fields, computes their sum, and displays the result.

add-3d-annotation-custom-camera.title: Add 3D Annotation with Custom Camera to PDF
add-3d-annotation-custom-camera.description: Shows how to embed a U3D/PRC model in a PDF, define a custom camera matrix, create a 3D view, and add a 3D annotation to display the product from a specific perspective.

fade-background-artifacts-opacity.title: Fade Background Artifacts by Setting Opacity
fade-background-artifacts-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over each page's artifacts, and set the opacity of all BackgroundArtifact objects to 40 % for a faded effect, then save the result.

add-rich-media-video-annotation.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation with Poster to PDF
add-rich-media-video-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed an MP4 video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and set a poster image that appears before playback using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-to-page-five.title: Add Sound Annotation to Page Five
add-sound-annotation-to-page-five.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, verifying it has at least five pages, creating a SoundAnnotation with an audio file, placing it on a defined region of page five, and saving the updated document.

add-qr-code-watermark-artifact.title: Add QR Code Watermark Artifact to PDF
add-qr-code-watermark-artifact.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF and adding a QR code image as a watermark artifact positioned at the top‑right corner using Aspose.Pdf.

toggle-annotations-button.title: Toggle Annotations Visibility with a PDF Button
toggle-annotations-button.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button form field that hides and shows all other annotations on the same page using Aspose.Pdf actions.

add-sound-annotations-per-page.title: Add Sound Annotations to PDF Pages with Different Audio Files
add-sound-annotations-per-page.description: Demonstrates how to batch add a SoundAnnotation to each page of a PDF, using a distinct audio file for each page, and then save the modified document.

extract-embedded-media-from-screen-annot.title: Extract Embedded Media from Screen Annotations
extract-embedded-media-from-screen-annot.description: Shows how to locate ScreenAnnotation objects in a PDF, retrieve the embedded media via a GoToRemoteAction, and write the media stream to a file for external analysis.

add-read-only-rich-media-pdf-annotation.title: Add Read‑Only Rich Media PDF Annotation
add-read-only-rich-media-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed another PDF as a rich‑media annotation in a target PDF and make it read‑only so no interactive features are available.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotations to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through every annotation on each page, and writes key details (page number, type, rectangle, title, contents) to a CSV file for auditing.

add-button-annotation-highlight-text-fie.title: Add Button Annotation with JavaScript to Highlight Text Fields
add-button-annotation-highlight-text-fie.description: Demonstrates how to create a button annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, assign a JavaScript action that highlights all text fields on the current page, and save the modified document.

add-pdf-page-as-tiled-background.title: Add High‑Resolution PDF Page as Tiled Background
add-pdf-page-as-tiled-background.description: Demonstrates how to use a BackgroundArtifact to place a high‑resolution PDF page as a tiled background behind the contents of a new PDF document.

set-link-annotation-border-color-width.title: Set Red Border and Width for Link Annotations
set-link-annotation-border-color-width.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and link annotations, and programmatically change each link annotation's border color to red and its line width to three points using Aspose.Pdf.

add-repeating-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Create Repeating Text Watermark Across PDF Pages
add-repeating-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact to place a semi‑transparent repeating text watermark behind the content of every page in a PDF document.

add-readonly-screen-annotation-swf.title: Add Read‑Only Screen Annotation with External SWF to PDF
add-readonly-screen-annotation-swf.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a ScreenAnnotation that references an external SWF file, marks it as read‑only to prevent user interaction, and saves the updated document.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files, import matching XFDF annotation files into each PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and save the annotated PDFs to an output folder while preserving the original content.

add-js-calc-button-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Button to Calculate Total in PDF
add-js-calc-button-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a push‑button form field in a PDF, assign a JavaScript action that sums two numeric fields, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rich-media-video-annotation__v2.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation to PDF
add-rich-media-video-annotation__v2.description: Shows how to embed a video file as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF document and configure it to start playback on user interaction.

replace-background-artifacts-with-new-im.title: Replace Background Artifacts with New Image in PDF
replace-background-artifacts-with-new-im.description: Shows how to loop through PDF pages, find BackgroundArtifact objects, and replace their images while keeping the original positions unchanged.

metadata-barcode-watermark-annotation.title: Add Metadata-Based Barcode Text Watermark
metadata-barcode-watermark-annotation.description: Shows how to read a PDF's title metadata and embed it as text in a WatermarkAnnotation on the first page, then save the watermarked PDF.

add-javascript-link-annotation-modal-dia.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Show Modal Dialog
add-javascript-link-annotation-modal-dia.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation with a JavaScript action that displays a custom modal dialog in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-watermark-dynamic-opacity.title: Batch Add WatermarkArtifact with Dynamic Opacity to PDFs
batch-watermark-dynamic-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, calculate opacity based on each document's page count, and add a centered WatermarkArtifact to every page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-3d-metallic-annotation.title: Create 3D Annotation with Metallic Lighting
create-3d-metallic-annotation.description: Demonstrates embedding a 3D model (U3D/PRC) into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and applying a CAD lighting scheme with shaded illustration render mode to simulate realistic metal surfaces.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation to PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to embed a sound annotation that plays a chime when a specific PDF page becomes visible, using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-richmediaannotations-to-summary-pa.title: Clone RichMediaAnnotations to a Summary Page
clone-richmediaannotations-to-summary-pa.description: Shows how to copy all RichMediaAnnotation objects from a PDF and place cloned annotations on a newly added summary page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-button-export-annotations-json.title: Add Button to Export Annotations as JSON
add-button-export-annotations-json.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button field into a PDF that runs JavaScript to retrieve all annotations and display them as a JSON string.

add-diagonal-watermark-annotation.title: Add Diagonal Watermark Annotation to PDF
add-diagonal-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a WatermarkAnnotation that covers an entire page, set its opacity and color (simulating a gradient), and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.title: Extract Embedded Media from RichMedia Annotations
extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and annotations, identifies RichMediaAnnotation objects, and saves their embedded media streams to a structured folder hierarchy.

create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.title: Create Link Annotation to Open External PDF Page
create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.description: Shows how to add a link annotation that opens a specific page of another PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's remote go‑to action.

add-animated-gif-screen-annotation-page-.title: Add Animated GIF Screen Annotation on Page 3
add-animated-gif-screen-annotation-page-.description: Demonstrates how to place a ScreenAnnotation that shows an animated GIF, looping continuously, on the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

align-watermark-annotations-to-page-marg.title: Align Watermark Annotations to Page Margins
align-watermark-annotations-to-page-marg.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages and adjust each WatermarkAnnotation's rectangle so it aligns uniformly with a defined page margin.

toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.title: Toggle Rich Media Visibility with a Button
toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.description: Shows how to add a push button that hides and shows a RichMedia annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-3d-annotation-front-view.title: Add 3D Annotation with Front View to PDF
add-3d-annotation-front-view.description: Shows how to embed a 3‑D model (including its textures) into a PDF as a 3‑D annotation and set a default front‑view camera using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-update-watermark-annotations.title: Batch Update WatermarkAnnotations with Current Date
batch-update-watermark-annotations.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through all pages and annotations, locate WatermarkAnnotation objects, and replace their text with a string that includes the current date.

add-js-link-annotation-word-count.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation for Word Count
add-js-link-annotation-word-count.description: Shows how to create a link annotation that runs JavaScript to display the PDF's total word count using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-play-background-music-to-pdf.title: Add Auto-Play Background Music to PDF
add-auto-play-background-music-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed an MP3 file as a RichMediaAnnotation and configure it to play automatically when the page becomes visible.

add-background-artifact-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Artifact to PDF Page
add-background-artifact-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a BackgroundArtifact behind the page contents, setting a solid background color, and saving the document. Includes a note on how a gradient could be applied via shading operators.

add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Watermark to PDF
add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.description: Shows how to create a WatermarkAnnotation on each PDF page that displays the current page number, using Aspose.Pdf to set appearance and save the document.

add-rich-media-annotation-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Rich Media Annotation with Embedded PDF Portfolio
add-rich-media-annotation-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed a PDF portfolio into a RichMediaAnnotation and configure it to open automatically when the page is displayed.

change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.title: Change Button Annotation Color to Blue in PDF
change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over all annotations in a PDF, identify button annotations, change their color to blue, and save the modified document.

batch-add-video-screen-annotations.title: Batch Add Video Screen Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-video-screen-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to add a ScreenAnnotation containing a video file to every page of a PDF, calculating the annotation rectangle to preserve the video's aspect ratio.
